name: Spicy Greens and Red Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the lentils. Drain thoroughly.
2. Place in a heavy-bottomed stockpot.
3. Stir over medium heat until lentils are fairly dry.
4. Sprinkle on the cinnamon and cumin, then continue to stir and roast for 5 minutes, scraping occasionally to prevent sticking.
5. Carefully add water, then stir in garlic, chili flakes, and salt. Bring to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce to medium and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in carrot and onion, then simmer for another 10 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, carefully wash the greens, discarding tough stems and tearing leaves into bite-size pieces. Drain briefly.
9. When simmering time is up, stir in soy sauce and wine, then tomato.
10. Pile greens on top of the soup, cover with a tight-fitting lid, and cook for 5 more minutes.
11. Remove lid and stir wilted greens into the soup.
12. Serve very hot, with a lemon wedge at each bowl.
Serving Ideas: Serve with Middle East Salad and Armenian bread.
